acceptance_criteria.description: validate-skill.py emits MCP_DEBT_BD, MCP_DEBT_GIT, MCP_DEBT_HANDLER_BASH on known patterns.
Fleet audit aggregates debt score per skill.

commits.message: test(CL-ugwe.8): red - detect MCP migration debt
feat(CL-ugwe.8): green - add MCP migration debt checks

tests.command: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_skill_forge_validator.py
tests.result: red gate failed as expected before implementation: 3 failed, 2 passed

tests.command: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_skill_forge_validator.py
tests.result: green gate passed after implementation: 5 passed

tests.command: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run python -m py_compile skills/skill-forge/scripts/validate-skill.py

downstream_impacts: validate-skill.py now has --suggest-mcp and --format=debt-count CLI modes.
scan-skills.sh adds a DEBT column and Total MCP debt findings summary when the local validator and uv are available.
MCP debt detection is advisory-only and scans only bash, sh, zsh, and text fenced code blocks.
